name: PolitiClaw
description: Local-first personal political co-pilot: monitors legislation, tracks representatives, prepares you for elections, and drafts outreach.

apiKeys.description: One key required (apiDataGov); all others are optional upgrades. See docs/config.md and docs/adr/ for the tiered posture.

apiDataGov.description: REQUIRED. Shared api.data.gov key — used by api.congress.gov (ADR-002) AND FEC OpenFEC (ADR-005). One key covers both. Free, instant signup at https://api.data.gov/signup/.

geocodio.description: OPTIONAL UPGRADE. Reps-by-address via API (ADR-001). Default path uses zero-key local shapefile pipeline; Geocodio trades disk footprint for API simplicity. Free tier 2500 lookups/day.

openStates.description: OPTIONAL UPGRADE. State bills/votes with individual member positions (ADR-003). Without a key, state bill lookup is narrative-only via LLM search; state vote positions and state change-detection require this.

legiscan.description: OPTIONAL UPGRADE. State bills fallback or primary (ADR-003). Free tier 30,000 queries/month. Covers federal + state in one key if user prefers unified access.

openSecrets.description: OPTIONAL UPGRADE. Federal campaign-finance derived analytics — industry rollups, revolving door (ADR-005). Non-commercial use only. Without a key, narrative context falls back to LLM search (never dollar amounts).

followTheMoney.description: OPTIONAL UPGRADE. State-level campaign finance (ADR-005). Without this, state finance data is explicitly not covered.

voteSmart.description: OPTIONAL UPGRADE. Candidate bios for Phase 6 (ADR-004). Default bios come from LLM search with tier-5 tagging; Vote Smart is a structured upgrade.

democracyWorks.description: OPTIONAL UPGRADE. Ballot logistics — dates, deadlines, polling places (ADR-004). Partner-gated; requires an application. Default uses Google Civic voterInfoQuery (free, less reliable).

cicero.description: OPTIONAL UPGRADE (paid). Local (municipal/county/school-board) reps coverage (ADR-001). The only source that covers local — without it, local reps are explicitly not covered.

ballotReady.description: OPTIONAL UPGRADE (commercial). Structured down-ballot data for Phase 6 (ADR-004). Default v1 scope covers federal + statewide + 6 state SoS feeds; BallotReady lights up full down-ballot.
